title: FizzBuzz Shortest Code
description: Write a Python function solve() that returns the FizzBuzz sequence from 1 to 100 as a single string, separated by newlines. For multiples of 3 print 'Fizz', multiples of 5 print 'Buzz', multiples of both print 'FizzBuzz', otherwise print the number. Your score = 1000 - len(source_code). Shorter code = higher score.
